title: PRIMA Loaf Pan 25x13x6.2cm, Carbon Steel, Black
features: A heavy duty 3lb loaf pan ideal for making bread, meat/fruit loaf and pate,
Manufactured from heavy duty commercial weight 1mm steel
Double layer non-stick coating with rolled edges
PFOA, PTFE and BPA chemical free non-stick, safer for you and the environment
description: Product Description Perfect for making bread, meat/fruit loaf and pate. Manufactured from heavy duty 1mm electroplated carbon steel for total durability and preventing warping. Other features include rolled edges which means no rusting and a double non-stick coating. Dishwasher, oven, fridge and freezer safe. Box Contains 1 x loaf pan
